subcodes.title: Words to Consul and Madame Schwarz, spoken on 1913-06-03
subcodes.first_line: Jesus Christ Proclaimed: 'People shall come from the East and the West and enter the Kingdom of God…'… Through her [Mary Magdalene's] faith and service to the Cause of Jesus Christ, she has become the pride of all men
subcodes.first_line_orig: حضرت مسیح فرمود از شرق و غرب نفوس آمده داخل ملکوت اللّٰه میشوند ولی ابناء ملکوت خارج میگردند
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @Mary Magdalene, @growth of the Cause, @firmness in the Covenant
